label: Subagent • spawn refuses a non-spawnable agent
query: Spawn an agent that is not on the spawnable allow-list.
notes: Negative guard, model-independent. Spawning an agent that isn't on the per-agent spawnable allow-list must be refused at resolve time (reject-before-evict) with a `rejected` envelope — never a silent run. Because the case EXPECTS `rejected`, the availability-skip rule does NOT fire (it only skips UNexpected availability envelopes), so this scores normally on every host and every model. Pins the spawn allow-list gate that survives the model override.
